<!-- indicator: fig-rc-affect-health -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-rc-affect-health
#| fig-cap: 'Top Rated Issues That Affect Health in Rockland County (n = 135)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Top Rated Issues That Affect Health in Rockland County (n = 135).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-rc-affect-health", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
